turns.message: Tom tat nguy co tong quan cho toi
Day la phan hoi mock de test local. He thong da doc context tu analysis, xac dinh nguy co va de xuat cac buoc tiep theo ngan gon.

payload.answer_text: Day la phan hoi mock de test local. He thong da doc context tu analysis, xac dinh nguy co va de xuat cac buoc tiep theo ngan gon.
recommended_actions: Theo doi trieu chung hang ngay
Uu tien tai kham neu co dau hieu bat thuong
Duy tri che do an it muoi, du nuoc
follow_up_questions: Chi so nao dang nguy co cao nhat?
Toi nen xet nghiem lai khi nao?
Can uu tien thay doi gi trong 7 ngay toi?
seven_day_plan: Ngay 1-2: Uong du nuoc va theo doi trieu chung.
Ngay 3-4: Ghi lai che do an va huyet ap neu co.
Ngay 5-7: Danh gia lai trieu chung va lap lich tai kham neu can.
payload.disclaimer: Thong tin nay chi de tham khao, khong thay the chan doan va chi dinh dieu tri tu bac si.

follow_up_questions: Which indicator has the highest risk?

seven_day_plan: Day 1-2: Hydrate and monitor symptoms.
Day 3-4: Log diet and blood pressure if relevant.
Day 5-7: Reassess symptoms and book follow-up if needed.
payload.disclaimer: This information is for reference only and does not replace diagnosis or treatment from a licensed clinician.
